description_long: This house is a modern, rectangular building with a flat roof and clean, minimalist lines. The facade features large vertical windows and a prominent main entrance, which is accentuated by a sign and a set of double glass doors. One side of the house opens onto a paved patio area with outdoor seating and several trees, providing a welcoming outdoor space. The windows are arranged in both vertical strips and isolated placements, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The exterior is predominantly white with a subtle texture, and the roof includes a small raised section, possibly for ventilation or skylight purposes. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, openness, and integration with the surrounding urban environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large vertical windows, a prominent glass entryway, and a patio area with trees and seating. The exterior is white and minimalist, with clean lines and a contemporary feel.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance with double glass doors, large vertical windows, and a sign on the facade.
description_view_1: This side view reveals a secondary entrance area with trees and outdoor seating, as well as additional vertical windows.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the patio area with multiple trees and seating, and a series of tall, narrow windows.
description_view_3: This side view displays a long row of vertical windows and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the building's facade.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with vertical strips and large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features double glass doors, a sign, and a paved approach with no porch or overhang, emphasizing a minimalist modern style.
